paragraphs: With our GuidePoint Cloud Security Framework (GPCSF), we analyze the people, process and technology that support your Google Cloud security program and deliver a comprehensive report and roadmap. Our security assessments provide detailed recommendations for improving your Google Cloud platform security roadmap.

Our security assessments provide detailed recommendations for improving your Google Cloud platform security roadmap.

paragraphs: When you need a “hands-on keyboard” to build the security programs inside of Google Cloud, our team of certified Google Cloud engineers and architects will help you deliver secure configurations, policies and/or infrastructure as code. Our team can either help lead your cloud engineers or work alongside them. And our services are flexible and scalable to suit your unique needs.

paragraphs: With our Google Workspace Security Health Check, we thoroughly assess your environment’s people, processes and technology using the GuidePoint Cloud Security Framework (GPCSF) and the GuidePoint SaaS Security Framework (GPSSF). Our team brings years of cloud experience, along with expertise in CIS, NIST and Google standards and guidelines.

headings.text: Strengthen Security with Google Cloud-Certified Expertise

paragraphs: Our Google Cloud Security services are designed to help you implement a robust GCP infrastructure and security program with expert guidance covering strategy, health checks and infrastructure as code.
Evaluate your environment’s people, process and technology and gain a comprehensive report to improve your security posture.
Leverage our certified Google Cloud engineers to implement secure configurations and infrastructure as code.
